stories.title: The three tiers of Toronto fans watching Mitch Mar...
stories.summary: After an up-and-down postseason record with the Leafs, Marner is leading all playoff scorers for a team one win away from the Cup Final.

stories.title: Stanley Cup playoff trends: More chaos, young star...
stories.summary: Midway through the conference finals, here's what has stuck out in the analytics.

stories.title: Sources: NCAA denies Sorsby's reinstatement bid
stories.summary: The NCAA has denied Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby's request for reinstatement for eligibility for the 2026 season, sources told ESPN's Pete Thamel on Tuesday.

stories.title: Sources: Atkinson to return as Cavs head coach
stories.summary: Kenny Atkinson will return next season as the Cleveland Cavaliers coach, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

stories.title: Texans WR Collins gets raise in reworked contract
stories.summary: Two-time Pro Bowl wide receiver Nico Collins and the Texans reached agreement on an adjusted contract that guarantees his salary the next two seasons and includes a $9 million cash increase this year and an $8 million cash increase next year.
